title: Suguru Geto Origin
description: A datapack which adds the Suguru Geto origin to the origins mod.
body:
Play as Suguru Geto from Jujutsu Kaisen with this origins datapack! ### Bug Reporting Found a bug? Report it [here!](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1SrVDRwmrMTHZkEiikiNGglH7AuCQLk118VtfrZQ2-S4/viewform?edit_requested=true) ## Origin Summary Born with the Curse Manipulation technique, Suguru Geto lives in a cycle of exorcising and consuming. **Mob Manipulation**
You can capture and resummon mobs you've defeated.
_-Capture Mobs with [Right Click] .
-Cycle through captured mobs with [V] .
-Summon selected mob with [G].
-Mobs you can capture are highlighted black.
-Mobs that you have control over are highlight white,
-Toggle the ability with [C], so you can still ride horses and the like.
_ **Total Control**
Mobs that you resummon will fight for you.
_This works like it does with wolves, so if you are hit or hit something, your captured mobs will aggro onto it (If they can)._ **Repulsed**
Every time you absorb a new mob, you experience nausea **Unimpeded Movement**
You cannot wear armor stronger than iron. **Exhausted**
You tire faster than a regular human.
